metadata.title: Zhengzhou Guicai | Intelligent Desktop Color Mixing Expert
metadata.description: Specialized in R&D of intelligent desktop color mixing equipment, with independent patents and professional R&D team.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We look forward to cooperating with you to explore the infinite possibilities of color.

desktop.title: Smart Desktop Mixer
desktop.desc: High precision color matching for lab and small scale production

industrial.desc: Efficient color solutions for mass production

intro.title: Introduction
intro.desc: Learn about Guicai's history and strength

team.title: R&D Team
team.desc: Core technical team composed of industry experts

mission.title: Mission
mission.detail: We are committed to innovative color mixing technology, allowing every color to precisely express emotion and creativity. Not just providing equipment, but providing a continuous source of vitality for the global color industry, making the world more vivid with color.

vision.title: Vision
vision.desc: Become a global leader in intelligent color mixing
vision.detail: Based in China, looking at the world. Our goal is to build an intelligent color mixing ecosystem covering the entire industry, defining the standard of future color management through continuous technological innovation, and becoming the most trusted color partner for customers.

values.title: Values
values.detail: Innovation is the driving force of development, precision is the soul of the product, service is the cornerstone of the brand, and win-win is the original intention of cooperation. We always insist on customer-centricity and never stop on the road to pursuing perfection.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: An innovative technology enterprise specializing in R&D of intelligent desktop color mixing equipment. Focusing on desktop color mixer technology and global technical services, providing professional solutions for color and liquid precision dispensing industries.
story.p2: At Guicai, we believe that color is not only a visual experience but also an emotional transmission. Every drop of pigment mixing carries the pursuit of perfection and dedication to innovation.

hero.title: Zhengzhou Guicai Technology
hero.subtitle: Art should not stop at color mixing, Guicai empowers you with new vitality.
hero.description: Founded on January 6, 2026, headquartered in Jinshui District, Zhengzhou. We are an innovative technology enterprise specializing in the R&D of intelligent desktop color mixing equipment, focusing on desktop color mixer technology and global technical services.

trends.title: Wide Application Areas
trends.description: Providing professional intelligent equipment solutions for color and liquid precision dispensing industries.

eco.title: Professional R&D Team
eco.description: We have assembled a professional R&D team with 6 core researchers deeply cultivated in the field of intelligent color mixing technology.

quality.title: Independent Core Tech
quality.description: With independent patents forming core technical barriers, we create desktop color mixer products suitable for multi-industry scenarios.

custom.title: All-Scenario Application
custom.description: Combining operational convenience, color mixing precision, and scenario adaptability to meet needs in coatings, inks, beauty, and art creation.

brand_power.title: Gathering Color Power
brand_power.desc: Bringing together top global color experts to present the most precise shade of every color.

collision.desc: Exploring the infinite possibilities of color across different dimensions, where every collision sparks innovation.

footer.description: An innovative technology enterprise specializing in R&D of intelligent desktop color mixing equipment. Focusing on desktop color mixer technology and global technical services, providing professional solutions for color and liquid precision dispensing industries.
